surfaces.evidence: SannySoft local dogfood direct-host run reported WebDriver present and navigator.webdriver=true.
Local dogfood captured host Apple/ANGLE WebGL renderer; no target persona comparison was performed.
Local dogfood captured zh-TW language; no cross-surface proxy/timezone score was performed.
No proxy detector run was executed.
No BrowserLeaks/CreepJS/Pixelscan font run was executed.
No BrowserLeaks/CreepJS/BrowserScan audio run was executed.
No BrowserScan storage/incognito run was executed.

decision: Keep live-detector-evidence release gate blocked. Dogfood proved wiring and exposed automation detection; it did not prove anti-detect readiness.
